title: NVIDIA Dynamo — Smart Router + KV Manager
summary_zh: 最具生產就緒性的 PD disaggregation 框架，具備明確的 agentic 功能：radix-tree KV cache 追蹤的 Smart Router、SLA-based 動態 P/D scaling 的 Planner、分層 offloading 的 KV Block Manager。v1.0 新增 cache pinning TTL（nvext.cache_control）和 LangChain 整合。GB300 NVL72 上 30× 吞吐量。
summary_en: The most production-ready PD disaggregation framework with explicit agentic capabilities: Smart Router with radix-tree KV cache tracking, Planner for SLA-based dynamic P/D scaling, KV Block Manager for hierarchical offloading. v1.0 adds cache pinning TTL (nvext.cache_control) and LangChain integration. 30x throughput on GB300 NVL72.
